title: EVgo (EVGO) Q1 Earnings Report Preview: What To Look For
text: Electric vehicle charging company EVgo will report Q1 earnings on Tuesday morning. The company previously exceeded analyst expectations, delivering revenues of $118.5 million, representing a 75.5% year-over-year increase along with 99 gigawatt-hours sold (up 17.9% annually). For the current quarter, analysts anticipate revenue growth of 18.4% year-over-year, a notable deceleration from the prior year's 36.5% expansion. According to the article, EVgo rarely misses Wall Street's revenue estimates, suggesting consistency in meeting projections. The renewable energy sector shows positive momentum. Peer Bloom Energy achieved 130% year-over-year revenue growth, while Generac reported 12.4% growth, with both stocks rising substantially post-earnings. EVgo shares have climbed 16.2% over the preceding month, with an average analyst price target of $4.75 against a current price of $2.15. The renewable energy segment has experienced broader investor optimism, with average share prices appreciating 9.4% over the same period.
